tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall dnsfilter profile
    edit "DNS_Exfil_Block"
        set comment "Block DNS tunneling/exfiltration"
        set block-malicious-url enable
        set log-all-domain enable
    next
end
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set utm-status enable
        set dnsfilter-profile "DNS_Exfil_Block"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end
show firewall policy
show firewall dnsfilter profile"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device

tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy 2
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "Block-DNS-Tunnel-8853"
        set uuid 73c9c630-335a-51f1-05d0-055225f586df
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS_8853"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end
